signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.16% YoY, up from 2.00% in February.** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]

South Korea's Statistics Korea reported the Consumer Price Index at 118.8 for March 2026, with month-over-month inflation at 0.34% and year-over-year at 2.16%, slightly exceeding the prior month's 2.00% but below some market forecasts of 2.4%[1][3]. This fresh data rel
